MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT J&R THOMPSON, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Patrick O'Neil, Esq. of McNeil, Silveira, Rice & Wiley (415) 472-3434, appearing for defendant and Moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike denied as not properly noticed and addressed. Points and authorities improperly reference the special motion to strike and fail to adequately develop arguments. (Counsel to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2010 Unknown
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT J&R THOMPSON, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Patrick O'Neil, Esq. of McNeil, Silveira, Rice & Wiley (415) 472-3434, appearing for defendant and Moving party. There are no other appearances. (Court treats plaintiff's opposition as opposition to both demurrer and motion to strike.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to support each cause of action and specify to which defendants they apply. Plaintiff must plead legally recognized causes of action. (Counsel to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
